title: How to Set Up and Connect to the Company VPN
text:
Q: How do I set up and connect to the company VPN on my computer?
A: Windows: Step 1: Click on the Start menu and go to Settings. Step 2: Select 'Network & Internet' and then click on 'VPN'. Step 3: Click on 'Add a VPN connection'. Step 4: In the 'VPN provider' dropdown, select 'Windows (built-in)'. Step 5: Fill in the 'Connection name' (e.g., Company VPN) and 'Server name or address' (provided by IT). Step 6: Choose the VPN type (usually L2TP/IPsec or IKEv2) and enter your username and password. Step 7: Click 'Save'. Step 8: To connect, go back to the VPN settings, select your VPN, and click 'Connect'. macOS: Step 1: Click on the Apple menu and select 'System Preferences'. Step 2: Click on 'Network'. Step 3: Click the '+' button to add a new connection. Step 4: In the 'Interface' dropdown, select 'VPN'. Step 5: Choose the VPN type (e.g., L2TP over IPSec) and enter a 'Service Name' (e.g., Company VPN). Step 6: Click 'Create', then enter the 'Server Address' and 'Account Name' (provided by IT). Step 7: Click on 'Authentication Settings' to enter your password and any shared secret if required. Step 8: Click 'OK', then 'Apply', and finally select your VPN from the list and click 'Connect'.
